message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.15, update rust-version to 1.88, and refresh Cargo.lock

Version bump from 0.1.14 to 0.1.15 with MSRV update from 1.85 to 1.88.

Cargo.lock dependency updates include:
- fsqlite family: all crates updated to 0.1.1 (vfs to 0.1.2)
- jiff: 0.2.20 → 0.2.21
- time: 0.3.45 → 0.3.47
- deranged: 0.5.6 → 0.5.8
- wasm-bindgen family: 0.2.108 → 0.2.111
- js-sys/web-sys: 0.3.85 → 0.3.88
- num-conv: 0.1.0 → 0.2.0
- virtue-next: 0.1.0 → 0.1.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
